heading: Omitted
label: 61g–1 to 61g–3 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection 61g–1, , , , authorized, effective , Senate Majority Leader to fix the gross compensation of Secretary for Majority at not to exceed $25,611.05 per annum so long as position is held by present incumbent. See .Pub. L. 89–691, title IV, § 40480 Stat. 1024section 6151 of this titleOct. 15, 1966Oct. 1, 1966Sections 61g–2 and 61g–3, , , , originally classified to section 61g–3 and later reclassified to section 61g–2, authorized, effective , and each fiscal year thereafter, Secretaries for Senate Majority and Minority to each appoint and fix compensation of an assistant during emergencies at specified rates of compensation for not more than six months in each fiscal year. , , , abolished such positions, effective , and authorized Secretaries concerned to appoint such employees as they deem appropriate. See .Pub. L. 94–59, title I89 Stat. 272Pub. L. 95–94, title I91 Stat. 658section 6152 of this titleJuly 25, 1975July 1, 1975Aug. 5, 1977Oct. 1, 1977
